steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
The two given outputs are the same: $f(0)=4$ and $f(6)=4$. The slope is therefore $0$:
$$\frac{4-4}{6-0}=0$$

steps.title: Use the constant value
steps.content: A linear function with slope $0$ is constant. Since its output is $4$, the function is $f(x)=4$. The answer is C.
